subtitle.en: A faster path from a quota glance to the full story
subtitle.zh-Hans: 从额度速览，更快进入完整用量视图

body.en: Keep Codex and Claude limits, reset times, tokens, and API-equivalent usage within one click of the menu bar.
body.zh-Hans: 从菜单栏点一下，即可查看 Codex 与 Claude 的额度、重置时间、Token 和 API 等价用量。

accessibilityLabel.en: Quota Monitor menu popover showing synthetic Codex and Claude quotas.
accessibilityLabel.zh-Hans: Quota Monitor 菜单弹窗，展示合成的 Codex 与 Claude 额度数据。

title.en: From the menu bar to the full picture
title.zh-Hans: 从菜单栏，进入完整视图

body.en: A short, silent walkthrough connects the compact readout with Dashboard Forecast and Trends. Playback pauses whenever the page or window goes away.
body.zh-Hans: 这段简短的静音演示会把紧凑读数与 Dashboard 的 Forecast 和 Trends 串起来；切换页面或关闭窗口后会立即暂停。

accessibilityLabel.en: Silent transition from the synthetic menu-bar quota popover to the Dashboard overview.
accessibilityLabel.zh-Hans: 从合成的菜单栏额度弹窗过渡到 Dashboard 总览的静音演示。

title.zh-Hans: 操作更流畅，后台更轻量

body.en: Search waits for a pause in typing, incremental imports focus on new data, and unchanged refreshes avoid rebuilding the same summaries.
body.zh-Hans: 搜索会等输入停顿后再刷新，增量导入只关注新数据，无变化的后台刷新也不再重复计算相同摘要。

accessibilityLabel.en: Quota Monitor Dashboard with synthetic Forecast and Trends data.
accessibilityLabel.zh-Hans: Quota Monitor Dashboard，展示合成的 Forecast 与 Trends 数据。
